creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Trying to look over stale/duplicate PRs ... 

The port graphics/rubygem-rmagick used to exist and then was deleted 
about a year ago because it was a duplicate of ruby-rmagick.  Is the 
intention to bring it back under the old name? 

I have to admit confusion here.
